Author: Enjoyer
Name: StatusPulse
Punchline: Real-time FFXIV character status synchronization with Supabase.
Description: Automatically exports your character's live data (Name, Job, World, Location, and Duty status) to a Supabase table at regular intervals. Recommended for developers building live character dashboards or status widgets. Configure your Supabase URL and API Key using the config window.
